payload.query: The field of American politics is frequently divided into subfields such as behavior or institutions. Offer and defend a definition of the two subfields. Then use an important political event to show how the literature in one or both of these subfields can help to explain the actions taken by relevant actors during the particular event. Discuss more than one theory to explain the event.

articles.title: Read the Supreme Court’s Decision on Trump’s Sweeping Tariffs
articles.abstract: In a major setback for President Trump’s economic agenda, the court ruled that he could not invoke an emergency power to set tariffs on imports.
